title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focusless-First + Focus Theft Recovery
desc: [RULE] Skill content MUST be in English -- Korean uses 2-3x tokens. PHILOSOPHY: focusless-first is the PRIMARY goal -- if every CDP step is truly focusless, focus theft never occurs and all recovery machinery becomes unnecessary safety net only. Recovery (watchdog/retry/ForceForegroundWindow) is the FALLBACK, not the solution. LIVING DOCUMENT: update as each incident is investigated and resolved.
steps: 0. [RULE] ALL skill steps/desc/tags must be English only -- token efficiency.

1. [PHILOSOPHY] Focusless-first: design every CDP action so it never needs OS foreground. Recovery is safety net only -- if focusless is correct, theft never happens. Priority: (1) make action focusless, (2) add recovery as backstop.
2. [MANDATORY] Restore trigger = end of each ask/CDP action only. Watchdog = monitor+notify only, no restore.
3. [MANDATORY] ALL focus restore paths go through InputReadiness.Probe() -- OnProbeSuccess fires zoom+auto-hack.

4. [FOCUSLESS PATTERN] For any CDP call that can steal focus: (a) check already active (document.visibilityState=visible) -> skip, (b) SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE(8) iconify, (c) WaitForWindowStateAsync('minimized') NOT fixed delay, (d) fire CDP call, (e) RestoreChromeNoActivate SW_SHOWNOACTIVATE(4), (f) WaitForWindowStateAsync('normal') NOT fixed delay. Ref: SwitchToTargetAsync (complete), BringToFrontAsync (complete).

5. [INVESTIGATION PROCEDURE] When focus theft occurs: (a) which action, (b) which CDP method, (c) IsFocusStealingMethod() covers it?, (d) SW=8 not 6?, (e) WaitForWindowState not fixed delay?, (f) RestoreChromeNoActivate after?, (g) OnFocusTheft restores?

6. [CDP FOCUS-STEALING METHODS] Page.bringToFront, Target.activateTarget (no-op), Browser.setWindowBounds, Runtime.evaluate+.focus(). Gatekeepers: IsFocusStealingMethod()+IsFocusRiskExpression() in CdpClient.FocusRiskWatchdog.cs.
7. [KNOWN RESIDUAL RISK] Runtime.evaluate: JS .focus() inside page bypasses all CDP-level guards -- only recovery layer catches this.
13. [DONE] DismissDialogAsync: 동의 added + called after file-attach + before insert
17. [TODO] Audit remaining CDP callers for focusless pattern compliance
author: claude
